Module com.example.typinggame
Package com.example.typinggame.model.Interface

Interface IScore

All Known Implementing Classes:
Score
public interface IScore
Interface defining the contract for the game's scoring and progress management. It provides methods to handle point accumulation, error tracking, and transitions between different chapters and seasons of the game.

  • Property Summary

    Properties
    Type
    Property
    Description
    javafx.beans.property.IntegerProperty
    chapter
    Returns the observable property for the current game chapter.
    javafx.beans.property.IntegerProperty
    points
    Returns the observable property for the player's points.
    javafx.beans.property.IntegerProperty
    season
    Returns the observable property for the current game season.

    Processes a mistake made by the player.

    Increases the total score.

    Returns the observable property for the current game chapter.

    Handles the transition logic for the game's progression.

    Returns the observable property for the current game season.

  • Property Details

    • points

      javafx.beans.property.IntegerProperty pointsProperty
      Returns the observable property for the player's points. This is used for binding the score to UI components like Labels.
      See Also:
      • getPoints()

    • season

      javafx.beans.property.IntegerProperty seasonProperty
      Returns the observable property for the current game season.

    • chapter

      javafx.beans.property.IntegerProperty chapterProperty
      Returns the observable property for the current game chapter.

  • Method Details

    • addPoint

      void addPoint()
      Increases the total score. Usually called when a player types a word correctly.

    • addError

      void addError()
      Processes a mistake made by the player. This usually involves incrementing an error counter and potentially penalizing the current score.

    • nextStep

      void nextStep(int currentListLevel)
      Handles the transition logic for the game's progression. It updates the current chapter or season based on the progress provided by the word management system.
      Parameters:
      currentListLevel - The current difficulty level or season from the word source.

    • reset

      void reset()
      Resets all score-related data, including points, errors, chapters, and seasons, to their initial values.

    • getPoints

      int getPoints()
      Retrieves the current total points accumulated by the player.
      Returns:
      The current score as a primitive integer.

    • pointsProperty

      javafx.beans.property.IntegerProperty pointsProperty()
      Returns the observable property for the player's points. This is used for binding the score to UI components like Labels.
      See Also:
      • getPoints()

    • seasonProperty

      javafx.beans.property.IntegerProperty seasonProperty()
      Returns the observable property for the current game season.

    • chapterProperty

      javafx.beans.property.IntegerProperty chapterProperty()
      Returns the observable property for the current game chapter.
